summary: The diff implements the majority of the requested Goal-Oriented Progress System. Backend extensions for goals and trophies are present in main.mo, frontend pages for Goals & Progress and Trophies are created, tool integrations record progress, mood/journal hooks invalidate goal caches, and a TrophyEarnedToast notification component is implemented. However, there is insufficient evidence of therapy session completion (Serenity session) and group class attendance advancing their respective milestone goals in the backend or frontend.

missing_requirements.requirement: Completing a therapy session with Serenity should advance therapy milestone goals, and group class attendance should advance group session milestone goals.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows mood, journal, breathing, grounding, and reframing tool integrations, but there is no evidence of backend or frontend hooks that fire when a Serenity therapy session is completed or a group class is attended to advance the corresponding milestone goals.
